items.title: US Bitcoin ETFs post 6-day inflow streak as crypto rallies
items.summary: US-listed spot Bitcoin ETFs have tallied nearly $1 billion in inflows since March 9, with Bitcoin rising more than 12% to $74,250 over the same period.
items.title_cn: 美国比特币ETF连续6天资金净流入，加密货币市场反弹
items.summary_cn: 自3月9日以来，美国上市的现货比特币ETF已录得近10亿美元的资金流入，同期比特币上涨超过12%，达到74,250美元。

items.title: Wife used CCTV to steal $176M of husband’s crypto, UK court told
items.summary: Justice Cotter said the husband has a high chance of succeeding based on the available evidence and recommended an early trial.
items.title_cn: 英国法庭：妻子利用监控摄像头窃取丈夫价值1.76亿美元加密货币
items.summary_cn: 科特法官表示，根据现有证据，丈夫胜诉的可能性很高，并建议尽早开庭审理。

items.title: Price predictions 3/16: SPX, DXY, BTC, ETH, BNB, XRP, SOL, DOGE, ADA, HYPE
items.summary: Bitcoin opened the week by rallying straight into a key resistance level. If it holds, BTC and altcoins could embark on the next leg of the crypto bull market.
items.title_cn: 3月16日价格预测：标普500指数、美元指数、比特币、以太坊、币安币、瑞波币、Solana、狗狗币、卡尔达诺、HYPE
items.summary_cn: 比特币本周开盘后直接冲至关键阻力位。若能守住，比特币和山寨币可能开启加密货币牛市的下一个阶段。

items.title: Bitcoin tops $74.5K but are pro traders turning bullish again?
items.summary: Bitcoin’s recovery above $74,000 highlights a rapidly improving market, but several data points suggest that pro traders remain cautious and skeptical.
items.title_cn: 比特币突破7.45万美元，但专业交易员是否再次转向看涨？
items.summary_cn: 比特币回升至7.4万美元上方凸显市场快速改善，但多项数据表明专业交易员仍保持谨慎和怀疑态度。

items.title: Bitcoin’s push toward $75K revives debate over what drives capital flows
items.summary: Bitcoin chases $75,000 as the return of aggressive spot BTC ETF inflows, billion-dollar buys from Strategy and an improvement in investors’ risk appetite propel the crypto market.
items.title_cn: 比特币冲击7.5万美元，重新引发关于资本流动驱动因素的辩论
items.summary_cn: 随着现货比特币ETF资金流入恢复、Strategy的数十亿美元买入以及投资者风险偏好改善推动加密货币市场，比特币正逼近7.5万美元。

items.title: Vitalik Buterin promotes an update simplifying Ethereum node software
items.summary: The blockchain co-founder said the goal is to make the "self-sovereign" method of Ethereum users running their own nodes a user-friendly experience.
items.title_cn: Vitalik Buterin推广简化以太坊节点软件的更新
items.summary_cn: 这位区块链联合创始人表示，目标是让以太坊用户运行自己节点的“自我主权”方法成为用户友好的体验。

items.title: Ethereum Foundation sells $10.2M worth of ETH to BitMine in OTC deal
items.summary: The Ethereum Foundation completed a $10.2 million OTC sale of 5,000 ETH to BitMine as part of its treasury management strategy to fund operations and ecosystem development.
items.title_cn: 以太坊基金会通过场外交易向BitMine出售价值1020万美元的ETH
items.summary_cn: 以太坊基金会完成了向BitMine场外出售5000枚ETH（价值1020万美元）的交易，作为其资金管理和生态系统发展战略的一部分。

items.title: Bitmine speeds pace of Ethereum buys, boosting treasury to 4.6M ETH
items.summary: About two-thirds of the company’s tokens are currently staked, generating an estimated $180 million in annualized revenue.
items.title_cn: Bitmine加速以太坊购买，将国库增至460万枚ETH
items.summary_cn: 该公司约三分之二的代币目前处于质押状态，预计年化收入达1.8亿美元。

items.title: Three Ethereum indicators hint that $2.8K is the next ETH price target
items.summary: A symmetrical triangle breakout and an unresolved supply overhang are boosting the case that Ether may go as high as $2,800 in March.
items.title_cn: 三个以太坊指标暗示2800美元是下一个ETH价格目标
items.summary_cn: 对称三角形突破和未解决的供应过剩正在增强以太币可能在3月升至2800美元的预期。

items.title: Ether accumulation data points to a rally toward $2.8K, but there’s a catch
items.summary: Ether bulls appear to be targeting $2,800 as their next stop, but ETH futures data shows a divided market with limited odds for a sustained 33% rally.
items.title_cn: 以太坊积累数据指向向2800美元反弹，但存在隐忧
items.summary_cn: 以太坊多头似乎将2800美元作为下一个目标，但ETH期货数据显示市场存在分歧，持续33%反弹的可能性有限。

items.title: Twelve Individuals Linked to Onecoin Sentenced in Argentina
items.summary: The group of local individuals that handled the Onecoin scheme in Cordoba, Argentina, received jail sentences of up to 9 years and agreed to provide compensation to the plaintiffs. Another case involving bank employees linked to the crypto scheme is also being processed. Argentine Arm of Onecoin Sentenced to 71+ Years in Prison While Onecoin, […]
items.title_cn: 阿根廷12名与Onecoin相关的人员被判刑
items.summary_cn: 在阿根廷科尔多瓦处理Onecoin计划的当地人员被判处最高9年监禁，并同意向原告提供赔偿。另一宗涉及与该加密货币计划相关的银行员工的案件也在审理中。

items.title: TRON Joins Mastercard Crypto Partner Program
items.summary: This content is provided by a sponsor. PRESS RELEASE. Geneva, Switzerland, March 17, 2026 — TRON DAO, the community-governed DAO dedicated to accelerating the decentralization of the internet through blockchain technology and decentralized applications (dApps), today announced that TRON has joined the Mastercard Crypto Partner Program. The initiative reflects a shared belief that the next […]
items.title_cn: 波场加入万事达卡加密货币合作伙伴计划
items.summary_cn: 本内容由赞助商提供。新闻稿。瑞士日内瓦，2026年3月17日——致力于通过区块链技术和去中心化应用加速互联网去中心化的社区治理DAO波场DAO今日宣布，波场已加入万事达卡加密货币合作伙伴计划。

items.title: The Future of DeFi: Hugo Philion on Flare, XRP, and Real-World Assets
items.summary: Hugo Philion, Co-founder of Flare and CEO of Flare Labs, shares the developments underway at the EVM-based Layer 1 blockchain. Philion, who brings a strong background from finance and machine learning, details Flare’s mission to build an end-to-end decentralized finance ecosystem around the vast, yet underutilized, XRP asset. He shares his vision that a superior […]
items.title_cn: DeFi的未来：Hugo Philion谈Flare、XRP和现实世界资产
items.summary_cn: Flare联合创始人兼Flare Labs首席执行官Hugo Philion分享了基于EVM的Layer 1区块链正在进行的开发。拥有金融和机器学习深厚背景的Philion详细介绍了Flare围绕庞大但尚未开发的现实世界资产市场构建端到端去中心化金融生态系统的使命。

items.title: Minors Sue xAI in California Over Alleged Grok Deepfake Images
items.summary: The class action alleges Elon Musk's AI company knowingly produced and profited from child sexual abuse material.
items.title_cn: 未成年人在加州起诉xAI，指控Grok生成深度伪造图像
items.summary_cn: 集体诉讼指控埃隆·马斯克的AI公司知情生产并从中牟利儿童性虐待材料。

items.title: Sheriff's Deputy Sentenced for Extorting Rivals of Self-Styled Crypto 'Godfather'
items.summary: He used his badge to intimidate rivals of the self-titled crypto “Godfather." Now he's headed to prison for more than five years.
items.title_cn: 警长副手因勒索自封加密货币“教父”的竞争对手被判刑
items.summary_cn: 他曾利用警徽恐吓自封加密货币“教父”的竞争对手。现因勒索罪被判入狱五年以上。

items.title: Central Bank of Russia Proposes Opening National Economy to International Markets Using Digital Assets
items.summary: The institution has asked the government to allow digital financial assets to be issued on open networks like Ethereum, opening national businesses to international investments. Central Bank of Russia governor Elvira Nabiullina also stated that these regulations would help conduct cross-border settlements. Russia Sets Up Digital Assets As Vehicles For International Investment The Central Bank […]
items.title_cn: 俄罗斯央行提议使用数字资产向国际市场开放国民经济
items.summary_cn: 该机构已要求政府允许在以太坊等开放网络上发行数字金融资产，使本国企业能够获得国际投资。俄罗斯央行行长埃尔维拉·纳比乌林娜还表示，这些法规将有助于进行跨境结算。

items.title: Bitcoin Pushes Higher as Macro Tests Loom
items.summary: Crypto is extending gains despite pressure on equities and gold, with geopolitical tensions reshaping correlations heading into a critical macro window.
items.title_cn: 比特币在宏观考验临近之际继续走高
items.summary_cn: 尽管股票和黄金面临压力，加密货币仍在延续涨势，地缘政治紧张局势正在重塑相关性，进入关键的宏观窗口期。

items.title: SEC Proposal Limiting OTC Rules to Equities Raises New Questions for Crypto Assets
items.summary: SEC moves to narrow a decades-old OTC market rule to equity securities, signaling possible limits on regulatory reach while opening discussion on how disclosure frameworks could apply to crypto assets and other non-equity instruments. SEC Proposal Targeting OTC Equity Trading Sparks New Crypto Regulation Debate U.S. regulators are seeking to clarify the scope of a […]
items.title_cn: SEC提议将场外交易规则限于股票，引发对加密资产的新疑问
items.summary_cn: SEC提议将一项存在数十年的场外市场规则范围缩小至股票证券，暗示监管范围可能有限，同时开启关于披露框架如何适用于加密资产和其他非股票工具的讨论。

items.title: Did ChatGPT Really Cure a Dog's Cancer? It's Complicated
items.summary: The viral Rosie story credited AI with designing a custom cancer vaccine. The scientists who actually made it say the credit belongs elsewhere entirely.

items.title: Pokémon Go Players Helped Map the World—Now That Data Is Training Delivery Robots
items.summary: Niantic’s spatial AI, built partly from optional scans submitted through its AR games, is now helping delivery robots navigate cities.

items.title: Australia central bank hikes rates to a near 1-year high as Iran war raises inflation risks
items.summary: The 25 basis points hike was in line with expectations from analysts polled by Reuters

items.title: U.S. is allowing Iranian oil tankers through Strait of Hormuz, says Bessent
items.summary: The White House believes tanker traffic through the Strait of Hormuz will increase before Navy escorts are deployed, Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said.

items.title: Bessent says Treasury is not intervening in oil commodities markets and has no authority to do so
items.summary: Bessent addressed rumors that the Treasury Department or some other arm of government might step in to try to lower oil prices.

ai_summary.en:
**🌍 Global Macro & Liquidity**: Macro environment is restrictive with high fear. BTC Fear & Greed at 28 (Fear), VIX at 24.29 (High Fear), and US10Y yields rising to 4.22% indicate risk-off sentiment. Fed futures show restrictive expectations (3.635% implied rate). News highlights geopolitical tensions (Iran war, oil market interventions) and regulatory actions (Onecoin sentences), creating cautious narrative. However, TRON's Mastercard partnership and Ethereum updates provide selective crypto-positive developments.

**🟠 BTC Strategy (Contract Only)**:
* **Signal**: OBSERVE
* **Reality Check**: Mixed signals with RSI at 68.7 (approaching overbought) but negative funding (0.000042) and higher short liquidations ($7.08M vs $3.88M long) suggest potential short squeeze. However, ADX at 43.4 shows strong trend - don't fade. Upper wick exhaustion only 12.0% indicates limited selling pressure at tops.

**🔷 ETH Strategy**:
* **Signal**: WAIT
* **Reality Check**: Critical divergence between positive news (Vitalik updates, OTC deals) and bearish whale reality. Whale sentiment score 0.0 with NEGATIVE token net flow (-3.03M ETH) indicates distribution despite positive narrative. RSI at 75.7 shows overbought conditions. High long liquidations ($10.74M) suggest retail pain but upper wick exhaustion at 51.9% shows significant selling pressure.
* **Key Metric**: Negative token net flow (-3.03M ETH) contradicts positive news - whales are distributing.

**🟣 SOL Strategy**:
* **Signal**: PROBE
* **Reality Check**: Negative sentiment score (-0.1) but POSITIVE token net flow (3.69M SOL) suggests accumulation. High short liquidations ($3.45M vs $0.58M long) indicate potential squeeze. RSI at 65.9 is elevated but not extreme. News is neutral (repetitive from other sections). Upper wick exhaustion 36.6% shows moderate selling pressure.
* **Key Metric**: Positive token net flow (3.69M SOL) with negative sentiment suggests contrarian accumulation.

**BNB Strategy**:
* **Signal**: OBSERVE
* **Reality Check**: Neutral technicals with RSI 61.5. Negative funding (-0.000076) and higher short liquidations ($127K vs $15K long) suggest mild squeeze potential. Upper wick exhaustion 45.8% indicates selling pressure. No whale data available.

**DOGE Strategy**:
* **Signal**: WAIT
* **Reality Check**: High long liquidations ($1.22M) with even higher short liquidations ($1.68M) show two-sided pain. RSI 59.3 neutral. Upper wick exhaustion 20.0% and lower wick 6.7% show balanced pressure. No whale data available.
ai_summary.zh:
**🌍 全球宏观与流动性**: 宏观环境呈现限制性，市场情绪恐慌。BTC恐惧贪婪指数28（恐惧），VIX指数24.29（高度恐惧），美国10年期国债收益率升至4.22%，显示风险规避情绪。美联储期货显示限制性预期（隐含利率3.635%）。新闻突出地缘政治紧张（伊朗战争、石油市场干预）和监管行动（Onecoin判决），形成谨慎叙事。然而，TRON与万事达卡合作以及以太坊更新提供了选择性加密积极发展。

**🟠 BTC策略（仅合约）**:
* **信号**: 观察
* **现实检查**: 混合信号，RSI为68.7（接近超买）但资金费率为负（0.000042），空头清算（708万美元）高于多头清算（388万美元），表明潜在空头挤压。然而，ADX为43.4显示强劲趋势 - 不宜逆势。上影线耗尽仅12.0%表明顶部卖压有限。

**🔷 ETH策略**:
* **信号**: 等待
* **现实检查**: 积极新闻（Vitalik更新、OTC交易）与看跌鲸鱼现实之间存在关键背离。鲸鱼情绪得分0.0，代币净流出为负（-303万ETH），表明尽管叙事积极，鲸鱼仍在分发。RSI为75.7显示超买条件。高多头清算（1074万美元）表明散户痛苦，但上影线耗尽51.9%显示显著卖压。
* **关键指标**: 代币净流出为负（-303万ETH）与积极新闻矛盾 - 鲸鱼正在分发。

**🟣 SOL策略**:
* **信号**: 试探
* **现实检查**: 情绪得分为负（-0.1），但代币净流入为正（369万SOL）表明积累。高空头清算（345万美元 vs 58万美元多头）表明潜在挤压。RSI为65.9偏高但未极端。新闻中性（与其他部分重复）。上影线耗尽36.6%显示中等卖压。
* **关键指标**: 代币净流入为正（369万SOL）伴随负面情绪，表明逆向积累。

**BNB策略**:
* **信号**: 观察
* **现实检查**: 技术指标中性，RSI为61.5。负资金费率（-0.000076）和较高的空头清算（12.7万美元 vs 1.5万美元多头）表明轻度挤压潜力。上影线耗尽45.8%表明卖压。无鲸鱼数据可用。

**DOGE策略**:
* **信号**: 等待
* **现实检查**: 高多头清算（122万美元）与更高的空头清算（168万美元）显示双向痛苦。RSI为59.3中性。上影线耗尽20.0%和下影线6.7%显示压力平衡。无鲸鱼数据可用。
